title: Customer Service Officer(Order Processing| Semiconductor Industry)
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Provide comprehensive support to corporate clients by managing their orders and requests from start to finish.
  • Address customer inquiries in a timely manner, covering areas such as quotations, service assistance, and documentation needs.
  • Prepare and issue accurate quotations to clients, ensuring quick turnaround times.
  • Generate and submit necessary documents required by clients, tailored to their internal management systems.
  • Regularly update clients on the status of their orders and provide shipping schedule information.
  • Maintain up-to-date and accurate records of spare parts price lists for client reference.
  • Coordinate with customers, forwarding agents, and internal teams to ensure smooth order fulfillment and timely shipment execution.
  • Assist customers with customs-related inquiries by providing required documentation.
  • Collaborate closely with internal departments to address customer concerns and implement effective solutions.

Requirements:

  • Diploma in Supply Chain Management, Logistics or equivalent
  • Minimum 3 - 5 years of customer service and shipping experience
  • Customer-focused with a keen attention to detail and excellent organizational skills.
  • Experience in managing multiple tasks or projects with short timelines is a plus.

Interested candidates who wish to apply for the advertised position, please send in your resume to gs1@talenttradersg.com


EA License No.: 13C6305

Registration No.: R23117344 (Tiong Tian Ho)


For candidate who applied for the advertised position is deemed to have consented to us that we may collect, use or disclose your personal information for purpose in connection with the services provided by us.

postedCompany.description:
TALENT TRADER GROUP PTE. LTD.

Talent Trader is steered by young, dynamic professionals; each of them bringing their own vast experiences from leading Banks and HR Agencies.


We provide efficient talent sourcing, recruitment and retention services that help companies acquire effective Mid-management talent.


We offer the following value-added services for a variety of Mid-management positions across industry veticals such as Banking, Marine, Offshore, Retail, IT, F&B, Education, Manufacturing and Others:


- Talent Sourcing and Recruitment

- International Recruitment

- Contract & Temporary Staffing

- Payroll Services

- Employment Passes
